title: daemon disposal relaunch-flap guard
description: Stop the mk-spec-memory daemon SIGTERM/relaunch flap on owner-session disposal. The launcher's child-exit supervisor respawned the daemon on a 250ms backoff under a disposing runtime, dropping every bridged session's MCP transport. Fix: capture the launcher's initial parent pid and, at relaunch fire-time, abort + release lease + exit if the launcher is shutting down or its owning runtime has gone away (orphaned). Additive and recycle/crash-safe; addresses the owner-shutdown root cause v3.5.0.2 deferred. Deferred to follow-up phases: full RC-2 ownership re-election, mk-code-index reconnecting proxy, dead-socket reap hardening, CLAUDE_SESSION_PID/orphan-sweeper, persistent launcher log.
